title: Sahara

title: Shaitan
desc: The devil strikes a deal with a petty criminal to surrender his soul for three worldly wishes. However, the criminal must defy the odds and free himself from the devil's trap.

title: Besharam
desc: Nobia, a two time divorcee, chooses to shed her shackles to the institution of marriage and forge her own path as a businesswoman.

title: Notun Dhora
desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

title: The Break
desc: The change for the future breaking all society walls and judgements and stopping the stereotype minds. Taking the steps which our mind says and not others.

title: The Magician
desc: Hwanhui, who is a famous magician in Joseon, lives to save money to cure his sister's eyes. However, one day, a charming woman appears in front of him and his life changes forever.

title: Aai Am Single
desc: A young man sacrifices his personal life to look after his single mother. However, a new revelation casts a different light on their relationship.

title: Aazaar
desc: Representing the mental status carried by the rape victims and their attempt to cope with the aftermath of their trauma and find peace within their personal lives.

title: Sahara
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Choked Up
desc: Fiona Lacey, a politician, sees how quickly things can go terribly wrong when a career-defining live TV interview goes off-the-rails due to an unexpected coughing attack.

title: Planets And Robots
desc: An AI generated animation. A disembodied voice reassures us that technology will always need human creativity, while taking us through a hellscape of misshapen figures.

title: A Mind Full
desc: A hilarious slapstick comedy. A meditation teacher leads a class in a focused breathing session, but one unruly student may shatter his tranquillity.

title: Wild Summon
desc: Following the dramatic life cycle of wild salmon in human form.

title: Middle Watch
desc: A shattering encounter threatens to tip the balance of sailor's delicate state of mind.

title: Crush Hour
desc: The lovely lady in the yellow hat and the gentleman in the purple jumper might just be soul mates.

title: Mommy's Sleeping
desc: Ada is charmed by the subtle limit that separates reality and memory, letting the nostalgic memories of her father mix with the simple sound of everyday life.

title: Pushing Daisy
desc: Follows Daisy, an over-zealous business student, as she embarks on her first real-world experience working at Tom's funeral parlour.

title: Highway Nights
desc: With a crippling need to earn a living in a laborious world, an old lorry driver and a young sex worker form an unusual bond as the sun goes down.

title: Scissors
desc: The true story of a woman murdered in Naples, serves as a flash point of what happens when everyday misogyny is left unchallenged.

title: My Nephew Emmett
desc: At 2:30 a.m. on Aug. 28, 1955, in the most racially divided state in the country, 64-year-old Mose Wright tries to protect his 14-year-old nephew Emmett Till from two racists who are out for blood.

title: Sea Dragon
desc: A young fossil hunter attempts a daring heist in order to retrieve a mysterious skull that she believes could teach us about the history of life on Earth.

title: The Suitcase
desc: The ordinary life of Joe, a baggage handler based in an airport in Boston, is turned upside down when he steals a suitcase containing terrorist plans.

title: Madat
desc: A poor old man's life changes drastically one day. He then devises the most humane way to both help his family and punish his assailant non-violently.

title: Notun Dhora
desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

title: Ghazaal
desc: An award-winning drama. A teenage refugee scrapes by in a settlement camp by selling items and clothes but she becomes increasingly desperate when she receives her period.

title: Aai Am Single
desc: A young man sacrifices his personal life to look after his single mother. However, a new revelation casts a different light on their relationship.

title: Dusk
desc: A young Nepalese sex worker in the red light district of Kolkata heads out with her intimate client to watch the sunset over the river.

title: Pawn
desc: This is a story about an ordinary person who is torn into pieces between morality and propaganda. This film shows India where slowly minds are being poisoned and common man being used as a PAWN.

title: Night Shift
desc: This is Film - Thriller Category.

title: Dhaar
desc: Two friends get together after several years. However, their reunion goes south when they confront each other about past issues and secrets spill out.

title: How Can I Forget
desc: A multiple award-winning, unique twist on the rom-com. A chance encounter between two people takes a magical and romantic turn when they realise that they share the same unusual ability.

title: The Bridge at the Brogs
desc: A small isolated village, once a flourishing place inhabited by fantastic creatures and plants, becomes forgotten due to modernity taking over.

desc: In 1950s Las Vegas, a Black singer risks her shot at stardom when her audience won't be integrated.

desc: A young boy living in a world where all transactions are digital comes across an old 100 rupee note. Soon, he decides to use the money to buy a toy.

title: Choked Up
desc: Fiona Lacey, a politician, sees how quickly things can go terribly wrong when a career-defining live TV interview goes off-the-rails due to an unexpected coughing attack.

title: A Mind Full
desc: A hilarious slapstick comedy. A meditation teacher leads a class in a focused breathing session, but one unruly student may shatter his tranquillity.

title: Tell Tale Wank
desc: A pair of prospective parents are waiting for a social service representative to interview them about adopting a baby, and that is when they find a corpse in the bathroom.

title: Killing Christmas
desc: A feel-good festive comedy drama. A woman whose relationship with the holidays has become strained has a cathartic chat with a security guard after breaking into a furniture store.

title: The Mysterious Geographic Explorations of Jasper Morello
desc: A disgraced aerial navigator escapes from his plague-ridden home and goes on a desperate voyage to redeem himself.

title: Pear Cider and Cigarettes
desc: Robert's fascination with his best friend Techno's self-destructive ways takes a serious turn. When Techno faces a health crisis abroad, Robert embarks on an adventurous journey to bring him home.

desc: A mother finds comfort in her son's deserted bedroom, in which she rummages through drawers, makes discoveries and confronts the past.

title: The Last Ring Home
desc: A World War II hero's last wish was lost, found, fulfilled and lost again.

title: Utopic Dystopia
desc: A dark fairytale of an idyllic society slipping into a dystopia as competition rises.

title: Bangkok Barcelona On Foot
desc: A heartwarming documentary. Lluis and Jenn discuss their epic journey where they walked over 16,000 km, meeting welcoming and wonderful strangers and locales.

title: Hussain
desc: A moving drama. An office peon yearns to express himself through painting but finds his creativity is thwarted by everyday life.

title: Madhavi
desc: An Indian divorcée confronts her violent past at a lunch with old friends, leading her withdrawn daughter to finally see her strength.

title: Offline
desc: Arjun, a tech-savvy man, gifts his friend, Kuheli, a smartphone. As she gets accustomed to it, she finds her outlook towards life changing.

title: A Ghost Story
desc: A caregiver pays a final visit to a terminally ill individual during the pandemic lockdown. During his final moments, he recounts the story of encountering a gentle ghost.

title: Pop
desc: Stephen Graham stars in this gripping drama. A young boy is exploring his identity, when he befriends a local man, recently released from prison. However, his past may endanger them both.

title: Charlie Surfer
desc: A charming, multiple award-winning documentary. A filmmaker follows Charlie Clay, a young boy with Asperger's syndrome, as he spends the summer learning to surf.
